Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Defeat 12 Elite Gunner lvl 10, Elite Launcher lvl 10.
  2. Turn in the quest to unlock Weapons Cartel: Part 5.

Quest Text

Description

AF Transmission: "The Graven stronghold in Arrenius has been the central node for an underground weapons cartel. We need you to eliminate the Elite Gunners and Elite Lanchers so that we can infiltrate it."

Completion

AF Transmission: "It looks like we have found a few interesting things while you attacked Graven. Apparently the weapons are transported via Kapello.

Its probably the supply line for all enemy strongholds in the Antor system. We need to put at stop to it."
